sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110869" key="filargiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλαργικός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀργός</etym>) <sense id="n110869.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contemplative,</tr_> dub. in Fulg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Myth.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
